message:
Factor shared TCP transport helpers

Move the shared TCP read and client connect logic into async
helpers so the TCP operators stop carrying near-identical copies
of the same buffer and TLS upgrade code.

This keeps the operator files focused on their distinct lifecycle and
diagnostic behavior while still sharing the substantial transport
plumbing across accept_tcp, from_tcp, and to_tcp.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+//    _   _____   __________
+//   | | / / _ | / __/_  __/     Visibility
+//   | |/ / __ |_\\ \\  / /          Across
+//   |___/_/ |_/___/ /_/       Space and Time
+//
+// SPDX-FileCopyrightText: (c) 2026 The Tenzir Contributors
+// SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
+
+#pragma once
+
+#include "tenzir/async/task.hpp"
+#include "tenzir/box.hpp"
+#include "tenzir/chunk.hpp"
+
+#include <chrono>
+#include <cstddef>
+#include <memory>
+#include <string>
+
+namespace folly {
+class EventBase;
+class SSLContext;
+class SocketAddress;
+
+namespace coro {
+class Transport;
+} // namespace coro
+} // namespace folly
+
+namespace tenzir {
+
+struct tcp_read_result {
+  chunk_ptr chunk;
+  bool eof = false;
+};
+
+auto read_tcp_chunk(Box<folly::coro::Transport>& transport, size_t buffer_size,
+                    std::chrono::milliseconds timeout) -> Task<tcp_read_result>;
+
+auto connect_tcp_client(folly::EventBase* evb,
+                        folly::SocketAddress const& address,
+                        std::chrono::milliseconds timeout,
+                        std::shared_ptr<folly::SSLContext> ssl_context = {},
+                        std::string hostname = {})
+  -> Task<Box<folly::coro::Transport>>;
+
+} // namespace tenzir
